name: banksync-mcp
description: Connect to your bank accounts — transactions, balances, investments, and loans across 15,000+ institutions.
long_description:
BankSync MCP gives Claude secure access to your real financial data. Ask about transactions, check balances, track investments, and sync data to Notion, Google Sheets, and Airtable — all through conversation.

Tools span workspace management, bank connections, account data, financial queries (transactions, balances, holdings, trades, loans), automated data pipelines (feeds), and sync job management.

Supports 15,000+ financial institutions across US, UK, Canada, Australia, and New Zealand.

api_key.title: BankSync API Key
api_key.description: Your API key from banksync.io/developers (starts with bsk_)

tools.name: get_data_type_schema
tools.description: Get available source fields for a data type

tools.name: list_feed_sources
tools.description: List supported feed source types and their data type combinations

tools.name: list_workspaces
tools.description: List all workspaces

tools.name: get_workspace
tools.description: Get workspace details

tools.name: list_integrations
tools.description: List connected destinations (Notion, Sheets, Airtable)

tools.name: delete_integration
tools.description: Remove a destination integration from a workspace

tools.name: list_banks
tools.description: List connected bank connections

tools.name: get_bank
tools.description: Get a bank connection and its accounts

tools.name: create_bank_link
tools.description: Initiate a new bank connection — returns authorization URL

tools.name: connect_bank
tools.description: Complete a Plaid bank connection

tools.name: delete_bank
tools.description: Remove a bank connection from a workspace

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: Fetch live accounts from an institution

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Fetch a single account's details

tools.name: get_transactions
tools.description: Fetch bank transactions

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Fetch current live balance

tools.name: get_holdings
tools.description: Get investment holdings

tools.name: get_trades
tools.description: Get investment transactions

tools.name: get_loan
tools.description: Get loan details

tools.name: list_feeds
tools.description: List data pipeline feeds

tools.name: get_feed
tools.description: Get full configuration and status of a feed

tools.name: create_feed
tools.description: Create a new data pipeline feed

tools.name: update_feed
tools.description: Update a feed's configuration or schedule

tools.name: validate_feed

tools.name: delete_feed
tools.description: Permanently delete a feed and its job history

tools.name: list_jobs
tools.description: List sync job history for a feed

tools.name: get_job

tools.name: trigger_sync

tools.name: cancel_job
tools.description: Cancel a queued or in-progress sync job
